review_reason: Bounded iteration strategy (v004) insufficient. All 7 sorries remain blocked. Proof requires showing density iteration escapes equivalence classes, equivalent to completing density_frame_condition_strict (18+ sorries in Boneyard).

artifacts.summary: Documented blocker: bounded iteration cannot terminate, need strict density guarantee

partial_progress.details: Phase 1 blocked. All 5 sorries in strict_intermediate_aux remain. Investigation showed: (1) density iteration 'swings' between [a] and [b] equivalence classes indefinitely, (2) h_none from by_contra only applies to strict-above-a witnesses, (3) density_frame_condition Case B1 can return endpoint itself, not strict intermediate.

errors.message: Bounded iteration (depth 2) cannot guarantee termination. Equivalence classes can contain infinitely many distinct MCSs. The 'swing' pattern between [a] and [b] can continue indefinitely.
errors.recommendation: Complete density_frame_condition_strict proof (Boneyard has 18+ sorries), or find alternative approach using well-founded measure on distinguishing formulas.

completion_data.completion_summary: Investigated bounded iteration strategy for strict_intermediate_aux. Found fundamental blocker: density iteration produces intermediates in [a] or [b] equivalence classes, with no termination guarantee. Proof requires strict density guarantee not currently available.
